title: MENTAL HEALTH CARE - 211info
text: EUGENE MAIN OFFICE MENTAL HEALTH CARE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides bilingual mental health evaluations and services including individual, couples, and family therapy. 195 W 12th Avenue Eugene, OR 97401 Eligibility: Age 6 and older; primarily focus is Latino and immigrant population Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-noon and 1pm-6pm, after hours appointments available by request Email (541) 687-2667 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 687-2667 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for appointment FEES: Varies; accepts OHP, Lane County, PacificSource, Trillium, and Moda. Sliding scale available for those uninsured. DOCUMENTS: Insurance information, if applicable. Proof of income if applying for sliding scale fees. LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Lane County SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 9am-noon and 1pm-6pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: On 5th Avenue between Adams Street and Blair Boulevard. Lane Transit District (LTD) bus stop one block from location. Services: Adolescent/Youth Counseling * Hispanic/Latino Community Adolescent/Youth Counseling * Immigrants Community Mental Health Agencies * Hispanic/Latino Community Community Mental Health Agencies * Immigrants Family Counseling * Hispanic/Latino Community Family Counseling * Immigrants Individual Counseling * Hispanic/Latino Community Individual Counseling * Immigrants Mental Health Evaluation * Hispanic/Latino Community Mental Health Evaluation * Immigrants Other Services Offered At This Location: FOOD - MOBILE FOOD PANTY AND BENEFITS ASSISTANCE FOOD - ORGANIC GARDEN PROGRAM HOUSING/SHELTER - OHP HEALTH-RELATED SOCIAL NEEDS HOUSING SUPPORTS INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - HUMAN SERVICES SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER SERVICES - SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER SERVICES If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. EUGENE MAIN OFFICE
